NOTIFICATIONS.ORDER_CREATED: Your order has been created successfully. Total: {total}. Please proceed to payment.
NOTIFICATIONS.ORDER_UPDATED: Your order status has been updated to {status}.
NOTIFICATIONS.ORDER_PAID: Your payment has been received. We are processing your order.
NOTIFICATIONS.ORDER_PROCESSED: Your order is being prepared for shipment.
NOTIFICATIONS.ORDER_FAILED: Processing your order failed. Please contact support.

ERRORS.BAD_PRECONDITIONS: Cannot update order to status {status} from current status {currentStatus}.
ERRORS.ACCESS_DENIED: Forbidden access. You do not have permission to access this order.
